tests.test_name: Both inputs required before Check Coverage button is enabled
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The Check Coverage button only becomes available once the user has provided both a user story and test cases, preventing incomplete submissions.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Check Coverage button is inactive when the page is first loaded

test_coverage.verification_step: Button disabled with only a user story
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Check Coverage button remains inactive when only the story field is filled
Check Coverage button becomes active only after both the story and test case fields are filled

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: After submitting a story and test cases, the user sees a results panel and download options appear on the page.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage analysis results are displayed to the user after a successful check
Users are offered download options once results are available

tests.test_name: Clear button resets all inputs and results
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: Clicking the Clear button wipes both input fields and hides the results panel, returning the page to a blank state.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field is cleared after clicking Clear
The test cases field is cleared after clicking Clear
Previously shown coverage results are removed from the page after clicking Clear

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the coverage service fails, the user sees a clear error message instead of a results panel.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users are informed when the coverage check fails due to a service error

tests.test_name: Format selector is present and forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: Users can select a test format (e.g. Playwright) and that selection is correctly sent to the coverage service when the check is run.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test format dropdown is present on the page
The chosen format is passed correctly to the coverage API when the check is submitted

tests.test_name: Testing layers selection is forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When a user selects a testing layer, that selection is correctly included in the request sent to the coverage service.

test_coverage.verification_step: Compare request includes the selected testing layer
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen testing layer is passed correctly to the coverage API when the check is submitted

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears test case content and filename
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: Switching the test format removes any previously entered test case content and clears the associated filename, preventing mismatched data.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Existing test case text is removed when the format is changed
Any uploaded filename is removed when the format is changed

tests.test_name: Changing test format does not clear story input
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: Switching the test format leaves the user story field untouched, so users don't lose their story content.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field retains its content when the test format is changed

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: If a coverage result is already displayed, changing the test format hides it so users know they need to re-run the check.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are dismissed when the test format is changed, signalling that the previous result is no longer valid

tests.test_name: Changing testing layers clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: If a coverage result is already displayed, changing the testing layer selection hides it so users know the result is stale.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are dismissed when the testing layer selection is changed

tests.test_name: Changing data dictionary clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: If a coverage result is already displayed, changing the data dictionary selection hides it so users know the result is stale.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are dismissed when the data dictionary selection is changed

tests.test_name: Editing story input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: If a coverage result is already displayed, editing the story input hides it so users understand they need to re-run the check with the updated content.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are dismissed when the user modifies the story input

tests.test_name: Editing test input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: If a coverage result is already displayed, editing the test input hides it so users understand they need to re-run the check with the updated content.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are dismissed when the user modifies the test case input

tests.test_name: Story input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A user's story text is preserved when they leave the Story Coverage page and return, so they don't have to re-enter it.

test_coverage.verification_step: Story input still contains my text
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field retains its content after navigating away and returning to the page

tests.test_name: Test input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A user's test case text is preserved when they leave the Story Coverage page and return, so they don't have to re-enter it.

test_coverage.verification_step: Test input still contains my text
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test cases field retains its content after navigating away and returning to the page

tests.test_name: Selector state persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A user's chosen test format and testing layer are remembered when they leave the Story Coverage page and return.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The previously selected test format is still selected after returning to the page
The previously selected testing layer is still selected after returning to the page

tests.test_name: Coverage result persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A coverage result that was displayed before navigation is still visible when the user returns to the Story Coverage page.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated coverage results remain on screen after navigating away and returning

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: All story and test case inputs are cleared when a user logs out, ensuring no data persists into a subsequent session.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field is blank when returning to the page after logging out
The test cases field is blank when returning to the page after logging out
